title: Bullet Jump
description: As a Warframe Player, do you wonder why do minecraft doesn't have bullet jump ability. This mod fixes that and makes your dream come true. With this mod u can now bullet jump
body:
Hi, My name is SunniePaws, CEO of Yobonari Studio. As a Warframe Player, do you guys wonder why do Bullet jumping isn't a thing. If you guys wondering about that, i have made you guys a mod for just that. Now with this  mod u can now bullet jump with using Left Control (U can also use Ctrl+Space, but u neeed to adjust that). This ability makes you not take fall damage when doing it. So Have fun. 


**Showcase Video Coming Soon**


Mod Developer:

SunniePaws (CEO of Yobonari Studio)
